items.title: IBM (IBM) Beats Stock Market Upswing: What Investors Need to Know
items.description: IBM (IBM) closed at $294.97 in the latest trading session, marking a +1.19% move from the prior day.

items.title: These Stocks Moved the Most Today: Chevron, Valero Energy, Comcast, Tesla, CoreWeave, IBM, Coinbase, and More
items.description: Chevron, the last oil major still operating in Venezuela, surges following the U.S. capture of President Nicolás Maduro.

items.title: Intel Stock Gets an AI Upgrade. Why This Analyst Is Optimistic.
items.description: The AI trade faces doubts about whether it can last another year, but artificial intelligence also has its share of believers on Wall Street.  Shares of Intel and Marvell Technology could be winners.  One is Ben Reitzes, an analyst at Melius Research, who upgraded  Marvell Technology  and  Intel  to Buy from Hold and assigning price targets to both stocks.

items.title: Marvell and Intel Stocks Are AI Buys, Says Analyst
items.description: The AI trade faces doubts about whether it can last another year, but artificial intelligence also has its share of believers on Wall Street.  One is Ben Reitzes, an analyst at Melius Research, who upgraded  Marvell Technology  and  Intel  to Buy from Hold and assigning price targets to both stocks.  Marvell  came in at $135, and Intel at $50.
